title: William Donaldson
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: William Donaldson
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
biography: Dr. William (Willy) Donaldson has over 35 years of experience as a Board member and President and has been CEO of 8 companies and over 30 years of experience in higher education. Willy is the Founder and President of Strategic Venture Planning, a management consulting firm that assists boards, investors and senior management teams maximize results.
education_entries: Ph D in Systems Engineering, George Washington University
MBA in Business, The College of William and Mary
BS in Manufacturing and Management, North Carolina State University
research_interests: Areas of research interest: Strategic Management Systems; Corporate Universities and their impact on performance; Family business issues, dynamics and transitions; Entrepreneurship and Innovation; Systems Thinking; and Corporate Governance and Board Performance.
teaching_interests: Dr. Donaldson is an Assistant Professor in Finance. He teaches Advanced Financial Statement Analysis, Entrepreneurial Finance, Strategic Management, Innovation, Entrepreneurship and Systems Thinking, as well as multiple capstone classes. Dr. Donaldson is the Director of the Luter Business Institute.
publications: Book, Textbook-New Welcome to the World of Business . Kendall Hunt Publishing.
Journal Article, Academic Journal A Triadic Mentorship-Informed Internship Model: Innovations at the Intersection of Administration, Academia, and Practice . Journal of Experiential Education.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). Leaders as Followers: Don't Forget Governace . Journal of Management Development. Volume, 45. Issue, 1. Pages, 91-97.
Journal Article, Professional Journal (2025). A Modern Approach to Academic Rank and Tenure . Trusteeship. Issue, May-June 25. Pages, 46-47.
Research Report (2025). Business Plan for a Domestic Supply of Superconducting Radiofrequency Cavities . U.S. Department of Energy Office of Scientific and Technical Information.
Journal Article, Professional Journal (2024). The Broken Business Model in Higher Education . Trusteeship.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Family and Family Business Intersections, Failure Modes, and Recommendations: Notes From the Field . Small Business Institute Journal.
Newspaper (2024). Is a corporate university right for your business? . Va Pilot and Daily Press.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New Making Leadership Manifest Through a Corporate University .

Newspaper (2023). Getting yourself and your business ready for transition or sale . Va Pilot and Daily Press.

Journal Article, Professional Journal (2023). How to Effectively Plan for Digital Transformation . Strategy Magazine. Volume, Spring 2023. Issue, 38. Pages, 16-18.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2023). Systems Thinking . SAGE Publications Inc.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2023). Bureaucracy . SAGE Publications Inc. Pages, 1120.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Introduction: Leadership in an Infinite Game . Journal of Leadership Studies. Volume, 15. Issue, 3. Pages, 40-42.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Enlightenment 2.0 . Journal of Leadership Studies/Wiley. Volume, 15. Issue, 3.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Symposium Introduction . Journal of Leadership Studies/Wiley. Volume, 15. Issue, 3.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Postface – Introduction to Issue 2 . Journal of Leadership Studies/Wiley. Volume, 15. Issue, 2.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Leadership as System Holon . Journal of Leadership Studies. Volume, 15. Issue, 2.
